emails.subject: Southern California Water Company
emails.body: Southern California Water Company Sara, Per the request of Chris Foster, attached please find a credit worksheet for a draft Master ISDA Agreement between ENA and Southern California Water Company. Please let me know if you have any questions. Regards, Tracy 503-464-8755

emails.subject: Southern California Water Company
emails.body: Tracy: We can't move any further with Southern California Water Company (for derivatives trading) as they believe that the company requires CA PUC approval. Does legal need to actively pursue this party for financial trading? Hope you're surviving! Sara Shackleton Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3801a Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-5620 (phone) 713-646-3490 (fax) sara.shackleton@enron.com

emails.subject: Southern California Water Company
emails.body: Tracy: We can't move any further with Southern California Water Company (for derivatives trading) as they believe that the company requires CA PUC approval. emails.subject: Re: Southern California Water Company
emails.body: Re: Southern California Water Company I don't believe so Sara. Initially, the cp wanted to do a financial trade but since then Chris Foster informed me that they are now looking to take it physical. Therefore, I recently sent a request to the physical power legal team to process a draft EEI. I will advise if financial becomes a priority but it doesn't look like it at this time. Thanks for following up. Tracy From: Sara Shackleton on 02/02/2001 07:22 AM
